name: Grant an access token
description:
As a PubNub customer I want to restrict and allow access to
  specific PubNub resources (channels, channel groups, uuids)
  by my user base (both people and devices) which are each
  identified by a unique UUID.

elements.name: Validate that a token containing uuid pattern permissions can be parsed correctly

description:
Although clients do not need to know the internal details of how an access token
  is constructed, it can be helpful to have the ability to parse this internal
  structure to help with debugging and troubleshooting access issues.

name: Subscribe Loop auto-retry with access denied
description:
Test to ensure that clients won't try automatic retry when
  403 received.
